Opportunity Details

Name Of Post :Indian Army Rally Recruitment Agniveer, ARO, ZRO, Agniveer Women, Sepoy Pharma, Soldier Technical 2027 CEE Result
Post Date / Update :12 July 2026 | 07:05 AM
Short InformationJoin Indian Army has released the Rally Recruting Year 2027 Notification. Those candidates who are Enrolled in this Army Rally Agniveer, ARO, ZRO, Agniveer Women, Sepoy Pharma, Soldier Technical Recruitment 2027 Exam can Download Admit Card. Read the notification for Army Rally Batch Exam, eligibility, Post Wise Details information, Document Required, age limit, How to Apply and all other information.
Join Indian Army (Bhartiya Sena) Indian Army Agniveer Recruiting Year 2027 Army Agniveer Rally Exam 2026| Short Details of Notification WWW.SARKARIRESULT.COM
Important Dates Application Begin : 13/02/2026 Last Date for Apply Online : 10/04/2026 Pay Exam Fee Last Date : 10/04/2026 Agniveer Exam Date : 01-15 June 2026 Admit Card Available : 15/05/2026 Result Available : 12/07/2026Application Fee General / OBC / EWS : 250/- SC / ST : 250/- Pay the Examination Fee Through Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking.
Army Agniveer Rally Recruitment 2026: Age Limit Details For Agniveer GD / Technical / Assistant / Tradesman : 17.5 to 22 Years (01/07/2005 to 01/07/2009) For Soldier Technical : 17.5 to 23 Years (01/07/2004 to 01/07/2009) For Sepoy Pharma : 19-25 Years (01/07/2002 to 01/01/2008) For JCO Religious Teacher : 25-34 Years as on 01/07/2027
Army Agniveer Rally Recruitment 2026-27 : Vacancy Details
Post NameArmy Agniveer Rally Eligibility 2026
Agniveer in General Duty GD, Technical, Assistant, Store Keeper, Tradesman (Men)Agniveer Army Recruitment Candidate must be a resident of the district from where the rally is going to apply for recruitment. Education Qualification : Class 8th, 10th, 12th Post Wise Eligibility. Physical Eligibility Group I: Height : For Agniveer Office Assistant / Store Keeper : 162 CM For All other Agniveer Post (GD, Technical / Tradesman) : 169 CM 1.6 KM Running : 5 Min 30 Second – 60 Marks Pull Ups : 10 Times – 40 Marks 9 Feet Ditch Zigzag Balance More Details Read the Army Rally Notification.
Agniveer in General Duty GD (Women Military Police) (Women)Agniveer Army Recruitment Candidate must be a resident of the State from where the rally is going to apply for recruitment. Education Qualification : Class 10th Matric Exam Passed with Minimum 45% Marks and 33% in Each Subjects. Physical Eligibility Group I: Height : 162 CMS 1.6 KM Running : 7 Min 30 Second 10 Feet Long Jump 3 Feet High Jump More Details Read the Army Rally Notification.
Soldier Technical Nursing AssistantAgniveer Army Recruitment Candidate must be a resident of the State from where the rally is going to apply for recruitment. Education Qualification : 10+2 Intermediate with Science with Physics, Chemistry, Biology and English with minimum 50% Marks and 40% in Each Subject OR 10+2 Intermediate in Science Stream with Physics, Chemistry, Botany, Zoology and English with 50% Marks and 40% in Each Subjects. Physical Eligibility: Height : For Eastern Uttar Pradesh : 169 CM For Western Uttar Pradesh : 170 CM S Uttarakhand : 163 CMS 1.6 KM Running : 5 Min 45 Second Pull Ups : 9 Feet Ditch Zigzag Balance More Details Read the Army Rally Notification.
Sepoy PharmaAgniveer Army Recruitment Candidate must be a resident of the State from where the rally is going to apply for recruitment. Education Qualification : 10+2 Exam Passed and Qualified in D.Pharma with Minimum 55% Marks and Pharmacy Council Registration OR B.Pharma with 50% Marks and Registered in State Pharmacy Council . Physical Eligibility: Height : For Eastern Uttar Pradesh : 169 CM For Western Uttar Pradesh : 170 CM S Uttarakhand : 163 CMS 1.6 KM Running : 5 Min 45 Second Pull Ups : 9 Feet Ditch Zigzag Balance More Details Read the Army Rally Notification.
JCO Religious Teacher (Dharm Guru) Pandit, Pandit Gorkha, Granthi, Maulvi, Padre, Bodh MonkEducation Qualification : RT Pandit and Pandi Gorakha : Hindu Candidate with Shastri / Acharya in Sanskrit, (Karam Kand) as Main / Core Subject OR one Year Diploma in Karam Kand RT Granthi : Sikh Candidate with Bachelor Degree in Any Stream, Gyani in Punjabi RT Maulvi : Muslim Candidate : Bachelor Degree in Any Stream,  Alim in Arabic or Adeeb-e-Mahir/ Urdu Mahir in Urdu RT Padre : Christian Candidate with Bachelor Degree in Any Stream RT Budhist : Budhist Candidate with Bachelor Degree in Any Stream Physical Eligibility Group I: Height : General : 160 CM , Gorkhas & Ladakhi Region : 157 CM Chest : 77 CM 1.6 Km Running : 8 Min More Details Read the Army Rally Notification.
For JCO, ARO / ZRO / HQ Wise Vacancy Details Must Read the Army Common Entrance Exam CEE 2027 Notification.
Interested Candidate Can Read the Full Rally Notification Before Apply Indian Army Agniveer 2026 Online Form.
